title: Opinion: Germany in intensive care – a danger for all of Europe

title: Cyprus and Kazakhstan deepen ties with agreements, flights and investment plans

title: How Iran-linked social media accounts faked Irish and Scottish profiles to manipulate the public

title: 'It's not happening': EU loses hope in maritime services ban for Russian tankers
content: The EU is stuck with a ban on maritime services for Russian oil tankers. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz, the silence of G7 allies and the opposition of Greece and Malta have made any policy shift virtually impossible.

title: Explained: How drone incursions in Europe went from rarity to reality
content: A drone strike in Romania has reignited fears that Russia’s war in Ukraine is spilling into Europe. As incursions multiply across NATO and EU member states, leaders are racing to strengthen defences against a growing threat that blends military pressure, disruption and psychological warfare.

title: Why is the EU establishing return hubs for migrants — and why are they so controversial?
